mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) FROM places p
INNER JOIN place_tags pt ON p.id = pt.place_id AND pt.rest_type = #{restType}
WHERE p.status = 'approved'
AND (p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.update: UPDATE places p SET p.ai_score = LEAST(100, COALESCE( (SELECT AVG(r.rating) FROM place_reviews r WHERE r.place_id = p.id) * 20, 50 ) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM place_bookmarks b WHERE b.place_id = p.id) * 2 + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recommendations rc WHERE rc.place_id = p.id AND rc.clicked = 1) * 3 ) WHERE p.status = 'approved'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO place_reviews (`쉼표번호`, place_id, rating, content, verified, created_at) VALUES (#{쉼표번호}, #{placeId}, #{rating}, #{content}, #{verified}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.`쉼표번호`, r.place_id, r.rating, r.content, r.verified, r.created_at, u.nickname FROM place_reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.`쉼표번호` = u.`쉼표번호` WHERE r.place_id = #{placeId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM place_reviews WHERE id = #{id} AND `쉼표번호` = #{쉼표번호}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO place_bookmarks (`쉼표번호`, place_id, created_at) VALUES (#{쉼표번호}, #{placeId}, #{createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM place_bookmarks WHERE `쉼표번호` = #{쉼표번호} AND place_id = #{placeId}
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.address, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.operating_hours, p.ai_score, p.status, p.created_at FROM places p INNER JOIN place_bookmarks pb ON p.id = pb.place_id WHERE pb.`쉼표번호` = #{쉼표번호} ORDER BY pb.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO place_photos (place_id, photo_url, source) VALUES (#{placeId}, #{photoUrl}, #{source})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM place_photos WHERE place_id = #{placeId}
SELECT id, name, address, latitude, longitude, operating_hours, ai_score, status, created_at FROM places WHERE status = 'approved' ORDER BY id
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM places WHERE name = #{name} AND address = #{address}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO places (name, address, latitude, longitude, ai_score, status, created_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{aiScore}, #{status}, #{createdAt})
INSERT INTO place_tags (place_id, tag_name, rest_type) VALUES (#{placeId}, #{tagName}, #{restType})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM places WHERE name LIKE '%화장실%' OR name LIKE '%주차장%' OR name LIKE '%주차%'
DELETE pt FROM place_tags pt INNER JOIN places p ON pt.place_id = p.id WHERE p.name LIKE '%화장실%' OR p.name LIKE '%주차장%' OR p.name LIKE '%주차%'

DELETE FROM places WHERE name LIKE '%아파트%' OR name LIKE '%화장실%' OR name LIKE '%주차%' OR name LIKE '%편의점%' OR name LIKE '%약국%' OR name LIKE '%은행%' OR name LIKE '%ATM%' OR name LIKE '%치과%' OR name LIKE '%택시%'

DELETE pt FROM place_tags pt INNER JOIN places p ON pt.place_id = p.id WHERE p.name LIKE '%아파트%' OR p.name LIKE '%화장실%' OR p.name LIKE '%주차%' OR p.name LIKE '%편의점%' OR p.name LIKE '%약국%' OR p.name LIKE '%은행%' OR p.name LIKE '%ATM%' OR p.name LIKE '%치과%' OR p.name LIKE '%택시%'
DELETE p FROM places p INNER JOIN ( SELECT name, MIN(id) AS keep_id FROM places GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ) dup ON p.name = dup.name AND p.id != dup.keep_id

DELETE pt FROM place_tags pt WHERE pt.place_id IN ( SELECT id FROM ( SELECT p.id FROM places p INNER JOIN ( SELECT name, MIN(id) AS keep_id FROM places GROUP BY name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ) dup ON p.name = dup.name AND p.id != dup.keep_id ) tmp )

DELETE FROM place_reviews WHERE place_id IN ( SELECT id FROM places WHERE name IN ( '주-이수역헬스장영자','사찰몰','사찰식품','사찰음식도반','전통사찰식품제조협회', '주식회사찰랑','주식회사찰리앤초콜릿팩토리(CharlieandChocolateFactoryInc.)', '주식회사찰스일렉트로닉스','주식회사찰스푸드홍대지점','태광빌딩잠실고박사찰떡생고기', '홍콩 빅토리아 피크 야경','홍콩 란콰이펑 파티거리','온누리꽃식물원', '미술관','카페','헬스장','수영장','공방', '공원','식물원','수목원','갤러리','찜질방','스파','도서관', '마카오 타이파 빌리지 야경','4.19 혁명기념 도서관','101호 공원','공원' ) )

DELETE FROM place_photos WHERE place_id IN ( SELECT id FROM places WHERE name IN ( '주-이수역헬스장영자','사찰몰','사찰식품','사찰음식도반','전통사찰식품제조협회', '주식회사찰랑','주식회사찰리앤초콜릿팩토리(CharlieandChocolateFactoryInc.)', '주식회사찰스일렉트로닉스','주식회사찰스푸드홍대지점','태광빌딩잠실고박사찰떡생고기', '홍콩 빅토리아 피크 야경','홍콩 란콰이펑 파티거리','온누리꽃식물원', '미술관','카페','헬스장','수영장','공방', '공원','식물원','수목원','갤러리','찜질방','스파','도서관', '마카오 타이파 빌리지 야경','4.19 혁명기념 도서관','101호 공원','공원' ) )

DELETE FROM place_bookmarks WHERE place_id IN ( SELECT id FROM places WHERE name IN ( '주-이수역헬스장영자','사찰몰','사찰식품','사찰음식도반','전통사찰식품제조협회', '주식회사찰랑','주식회사찰리앤초콜릿팩토리(CharlieandChocolateFactoryInc.)', '주식회사찰스일렉트로닉스','주식회사찰스푸드홍대지점','태광빌딩잠실고박사찰떡생고기', '홍콩 빅토리아 피크 야경','홍콩 란콰이펑 파티거리','온누리꽃식물원', '미술관','카페','헬스장','수영장','공방', '공원','식물원','수목원','갤러리','찜질방','스파','도서관', '마카오 타이파 빌리지 야경','4.19 혁명기념 도서관','101호 공원','공원' ) )

DELETE pt FROM place_tags pt INNER JOIN places p ON pt.place_id = p.id WHERE p.name IN ( '주-이수역헬스장영자', '사찰몰', '사찰식품', '사찰음식도반', '전통사찰식품제조협회', '주식회사찰랑', '주식회사찰리앤초콜릿팩토리(CharlieandChocolateFactoryInc.)', '주식회사찰스일렉트로닉스', '주식회사찰스푸드홍대지점', '태광빌딩잠실고박사찰떡생고기', '홍콩 빅토리아 피크 야경', '홍콩 란콰이펑 파티거리', '온누리꽃식물원', '미술관', '카페', '헬스장', '수영장', '공방', '공원', '식물원', '수목원', '갤러리', '찜질방', '스파', '도서관', '마카오 타이파 빌리지 야경', '4.19 혁명기념 도서관', '101호 공원', '공원' )

DELETE FROM places WHERE name IN ( '주-이수역헬스장영자', '사찰몰', '사찰식품', '사찰음식도반', '전통사찰식품제조협회', '주식회사찰랑', '주식회사찰리앤초콜릿팩토리(CharlieandChocolateFactoryInc.)', '주식회사찰스일렉트로닉스', '주식회사찰스푸드홍대지점', '태광빌딩잠실고박사찰떡생고기', '홍콩 빅토리아 피크 야경', '홍콩 란콰이펑 파티거리', '온누리꽃식물원', '미술관', '카페', '헬스장', '수영장', '공방', '공원', '식물원', '수목원', '갤러리', '찜질방', '스파', '도서관', '마카오 타이파 빌리지 야경', '4.19 혁명기념 도서관', '101호 공원', '공원' )
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, address, latitude, longitude, operating_hours, ai_score, status, created_at, (6371 * ACOS( COS(RADIANS(#{lat})) * COS(RADIANS(latitude)) * COS(RADIANS(longitude) - RADIANS(#{lng})) + SIN(RADIANS(#{lat})) * SIN(RADIANS(latitude)) )) AS distance FROM places WHERE status = 'approved' HAVING distance <= #{radius} ORDER BY distance LIMIT 20
